scope: Deliver the first narrow registry and attestation flow for the permissioned testnet without expanding into full public-market modules.

mvp_modules.name: registry
mvp_modules.purpose: Track governed AI services, model releases, and declared safety metadata for permissioned operators.

state.description: Canonical service and model identity, owning organization, and current lifecycle status.
Approved release channels and deployment targets for each governed service.
Operator-submitted registry changes for audit and attestation linkage.

transactions.name: register_service
transactions.description: Create a new governed service record with organization ownership and declared safety profile.

transactions.name: propose_release
transactions.description: Stage a model or agent release candidate for attestation review before validator rollout.

transactions.name: retire_service
transactions.description: Retire a service or freeze distribution when governance or safety policy requires it.

governance_dependencies: high-impact service retirement routes through bicameral governance
emergency service freeze honors safety-council override semantics
validator_interactions: validators only activate releases that are registry-visible and attestation-approved
validator bootstrap must reject rollout plans for unknown or retired services

mvp_modules.name: attestation
mvp_modules.purpose: Manage safety attestations, reviewer bonds, and appeals for governed releases before validator activation.

state.description: Signed attestations tied to registry release proposals and audit outcomes.
Reviewer bond balances and slashing exposure for attestation participants.
Open appeal periods and finalization timers for disputed attestations.

transactions.name: submit_attestation
transactions.description: Submit a safety attestation for a proposed registry release with rationale and evidence pointers.

transactions.name: finalize_attestation
transactions.description: Finalize an attestation after quorum review and make the release eligible for validator rollout.

transactions.name: appeal_attestation
transactions.description: Open an appeal when new safety evidence or rollout harm invalidates an attestation outcome.

governance_dependencies: appeals crossing the configured threshold escalate to safety-council and token-house review
slashing recommendations remain advisory until governance authorizes enforcement
validator_interactions: validator rollout gates on finalized attestations for release proposals
appealed or expired attestations must pause validator activation and update local rollout plans

dependency_surfaces.name: identity_core
dependency_surfaces.purpose: Resolve organizations, operators, auditors, and role bindings referenced by the MVP modules.

state.description: Operator, organization, and auditor identities referenced by registry and attestation flows.
Scoped role assignments used to authorize MVP module transactions.

transactions.name: register_actor
transactions.description: Register an operator or organization identity for the permissioned milestone.

transactions.name: bind_role
transactions.description: Assign a bounded role required by registry and attestation transactions.

governance_dependencies: role definitions stay aligned with bicameral governance and safety-council authorities
validator_interactions: validator policy checks consume actor and role records before rollout execution

dependency_surfaces.name: governance_hooks
dependency_surfaces.purpose: Provide the explicit decision points where governance can freeze releases, approve appeals, or authorize slashing.

state.description: Bindings from registry and attestation actions to governance approval requirements.

transactions.name: link_governance_action
transactions.description: Declare which module actions need token-house, safety-council, or dual approval.

capabilities: bind module actions to governance checkpoints

governance_dependencies: inherits the existing bicameral governance policy and critical-action dual approval rules
validator_interactions: validator rollout plans must respect governance freeze and appeal outcomes before activation

dependency_surfaces.name: validator_ops_hooks
dependency_surfaces.purpose: Bridge registry and attestation outcomes into validator rollout and localnet/bootstrap planning.

state.description: Current rollout eligibility derived from registry state, attestation finality, and governance overrides.

transactions.name: update_rollout_gate
transactions.description: Project registry, attestation, and governance outcomes into validator rollout status.

capabilities: block validator rollout on unresolved attestation or governance state

governance_dependencies: must expose safety-council and token-house freeze decisions to validator operations
validator_interactions: directly controls whether validators can stage or activate governed releases

rollout.name: attestation-mvp
deliverables: attestation, bond, and appeal state types
release eligibility outputs for validator ops
